title: Generate hero and section images matching uploaded design reference

requirements.summary: Integrate all generated images as static assets and render them in their correct sections
acceptanceCriteria: Hero section displays a warm, professional care-provider photo on the right side of the hero layout
Youth Group Homes banner displays a photo of children/youth in a nurturing group home environment
Horse and Animal Interactions section displays two stacked photos of participants engaged with animals
Adult Day Programming section displays a photo of adults engaged in group activities
Gallery section carousel displays at least 4 distinct facility/home interior and community activity photos with location captions
All images are loaded from frontend/public/assets/generated as static assets
No broken image links appear anywhere on the page

file_operations.description: Update the hero section to display the professional care-provider photo using the generated image frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-professional.dim_600x700.png on the right side of the hero layout. Ensure the image is rendered with appropriate sizing and positioning to match the design reference.

Update the Youth Group Homes banner section to display the group home photo using the generated image frontend/public/assets/generated/youth-group-home.dim_800x500.png. Ensure the image is positioned correctly within the banner layout to show children/youth in a nurturing environment.

Update the Horse and Animal Interactions section to display two stacked photos using the generated images frontend/public/assets/generated/horse-interaction-1.dim_400x300.png and frontend/public/assets/generated/horse-interaction-2.dim_400x300.png. Position the images vertically stacked to show participants engaged with animals as shown in the design reference.

Update the Adult Day Programming section to display the group activity photo using the generated image frontend/public/assets/generated/adult-day-activity.dim_500x380.png. Ensure the image shows adults engaged in group activities and is positioned correctly within the section layout.

Update the 'A Look Inside Our Homes' carousel gallery to display at least 4 distinct photos using the generated images: frontend/public/assets/generated/gallery-home-1.dim_400x300.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/gallery-day-center.dim_400x300.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/gallery-community-rec.dim_400x300.png, and frontend/public/assets/generated/gallery-respite.dim_400x300.png. Include appropriate location captions for each image and ensure the carousel functionality works correctly with all images.
